name: Tim Kaine
subject: I'd like your thoughts on a new public health care plan to bring down premiums and create more options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Medicare-X is a new public health care plan that I introduced this week with my colleague from Colorado, Michael Bennet.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

I want to tell you about a bill that I introduced this week with my colleague from Colorado, Michael Bennet. **It's called Medicare-X, and it's a new public health care plan designed to bring down premiums and create more options for people across the country.**

Right now, many Americans can purchase health insurance through their employers or on the health care exchanges established by the Affordable Care Act. But for too many people, insurance is still not accessible -- there may only be one or two options where they live, neither of which they can afford. Lots of folks in Washington are seeing this reality and trying to figure out new solutions that build on the positive parts of the ACA, and fix some of the parts we need to fix. **That's how we came up with Medicare-X:**
* Medicare-X is built on the existing Medicare framework -- paying doctors the same as Medicare does, and allowing patients to be seen by Medicare's network of doctors.
* But it also expands the offerings beyond what Medicare currently covers; it includes the essential health benefits established in the ACA, like maternity care and mental health services.
* It also ensures lower costs on prescription drugs.

So, even though it's called Medicare-X, I want to be clear: This isn't Medicare, and this doesn't touch the Medicare trust fund. But it's built in the same way (a way we've seen work!). Why did we name it "Medicare-X"? I like to say that the "X" stands for "extra." It's Medicare's framework, plus a boost that lets all Americans take advantage of the option.

I believe that this public health care option is critical because of that last word -- option. People I talk to in Virginia and all over the country want more options in front of them. And this is especially true in rural areas, where the lack of choice is really stark. People don't want to be locked in to one way too expensive insurance plan. They want to be able to make the choice that's right for their life and their family. **So that's what we're trying to do here -- more options, lower costs!**

I'm really excited about this plan because I think it can make a real difference in people's daily lives. The security of knowing that there's health insurance available that you can actually afford is life-changing. So while Trump focuses on taking health care away from millions of Americans, we're focused on making health care more accessible and affordable. Medicare-X is a way for people to get the care they need, at a cost they can handle.

**I want to hear from you -- what do you think of Medicare-X, and what are your top priorities when it comes to health care reform in our country?** [**Click here to take a quick survey -- I'd really appreciate your thoughts.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174d/3e0906/7b98bbeb/3e30a535/4009943369/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/take-the-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+take+a+quick+survey+mdash+&utm_campaign=20190406_1_SURV_TK_MedicareX&source=20190406_1_SURV_TK_MedicareX")

Thanks for reading,

Tim | ****[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174d/3e0906/7b98bbeb/3e30a534/4009943369/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/take-the-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=20190406_1_SURV_TK_MedicareX&source=20190406_1_SURV_TK_MedicareX")****

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. If you'd like to donate, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174d/3e0906/7b98bbeb/3e30a50e/4009943369/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-support?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190406_1_SURV_TK_MedicareX&source=20190406_1_SURV_TK_MedicareX") Thanks for having Tim's back!

name: Jess Fassler, Campaign Manager
subject: Our biggest priorities right now:
body:
Kirsten will be on CNN next week!
| | |
---
| | This is big: Kirsten will go on CNN for a live town hall on Tuesday. And in the meantime, she's criss-crossing the country meeting folks and winning votes. **[Can you donate to become one of 5,000 new donors before Kirsten takes the stage to help kick off our second quarter strong and keep her on the road?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d82/2ae112ef/6cfe079c/357daa07/590212063/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMTAtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3010-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
Peter,
In January, I said I'd keep you posted on all of our major events, goals and plans for this campaign.
Some big news right now: **Kirsten will get a chance to share her brave vision for the country during a live CNN town hall on Tuesday, April 9th!**
And we have a LOT else going on too. Here are our top priorities for this new quarter:
* **Open field offices and hire staff.** We are about to open field offices in early states, and we're adding team members across the country.

* **Keep Kirsten on the road.** Kirsten did a whopping 59 events last quarter, from New Hampshire to Iowa to Texas to Michigan. (In fact, she's in New Hampshire as we speak!) Everywhere she goes, Kirsten connects with people and wins votes. We need to keep her out there doing it.

* **Create a network of volunteers.** We need to recruit and train volunteers across the country to help us get the word out. To do it, we're building out a national digital organizing program to meet folks where they are.

Getting all of this done takes serious resources. We're not taking money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or fossil fuel companies, and we don't have a super PAC because Kirsten's values are not for sale. Instead, we're going to power this thing together, with supporters like you giving a bit at a time.
**So I 'm setting a new goal for this community:** Before Kirsten goes live on CNN, I think we can bring in 5,000 new donors to kick off this quarter strong and fund every part of our campaign plan.
**[Make your first donation to help us staff up, keep Kirsten on the road and amp up our volunteer operation.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d82/2ae112ef/6cfe079c/357daa07/590212063/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMTAtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3010-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3010-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3010-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3010-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d82/2ae112ef/6cfe079c/357daa07/590212063/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMTAtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3010-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for everything,
Jess Fassler
Campaign Manager
Gillibrand 2020
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d82/2ae112ef/6cfe079c/357daa03/590212063/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020

name: Team Tina
subject: What will you do to help Democrats win in 2020?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We can't win without everyone getting involved.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-april?refcode=rtw_20190406_em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") Friend, We already know the 2020 election is going to be tough. Donald Trump is targeting Minnesota, and the GOP is going to pull out all the stops to keep the Senate red and take back the House. **It 's going to take a team effort to re-elect Tina and make sure Democrats win up and down the ballot.** **[Today, we're asking Democratic activists like you to take our survey and help us prepare for 2020. Click here to let us know how you plan to be involved in winning races for Democrats next year. We need at least 2,500 responses before midnight >>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4c247/c1f7015/60939d23/11479b88/970209009/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201904_plans-nd?source=rtw_20190406_em")** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4c247/c1f7015/60939d23/11479b88/970209009/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201904_plans-nd?source=rtw_20190406_em") In 2018, thanks to supporters like you who made phone calls, knocked on doors, and chipped in what they could, we elected Tina to the U.S. Senate. We also flipped the Minnesota State House and elected the most diverse U.S. Congress in our nation's history. **We 're ready to keep up our progress -- but we can't do it without you. [Take our survey today and let us know what you'll do to help Democrats win in 2020.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4c247/c1f7015/60939d23/11479b88/970209009/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201904_plans-nd?source=rtw_20190406_em")** Thank you, Team Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Megan West
subject: The Luckiest Man - an inspiring interview
body:
| | Peter, I recently spoke with John Paine, author of _The Luckiest Man: How a Seventeen-Year Battle with ALS Led me to Intimacy with God._ Eighteen years ago, John was diagnosed with ALS, or Lou Gehrig’s disease, a degenerative neural disease that has progressively left him paralyzed from head to toe and will eventually take his life. But he refuses to be crushed in spirit or even to despair of life itself. John points out that there is one common question God does not answer in the midst of suffering. Rather, there is a different question people should ask God instead. John also addresses, with sincere frankness, the growing “right-to-die” sentiment and legislation happening in states across the country. Take some time to [watch this powerful interview](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k4OMOwv7GCSY5ZrRmKZSDi0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=1). I know you will be encouraged. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k4OMOwv7GCSY5ZrRmKZSDi0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k4OMOwv7GCSY5ZrRmKZSDi0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=3) What John says in the final part of our conversation about ALS and the intimacy with God that it has produced will leave you amazed. Megan West
Media Host
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190406com01&n=8)

subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"U.S. hiring sprang back in March, showing a slowdown in February was likely just a passing chill..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc35b2cf31&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [U.S. Jobs Grew by 196,000 in March as Hiring Bounces Back](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6c42a25285&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“U.S. hiring sprang back in March, showing a slowdown in February was likely just a passing chill during a historically long stretch of job creation. Nonfarm payrolls increased a seasonally adjusted 196,000 in March”—beating market expectations once again, Eric Morath and Sarah Chaney report. “The unemployment rate held steady at 3.8% last month, just above a 49-year low.”

**By the numbers:** [Unemployment rate for women is lowest since 1953](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ffbdc6fcfe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Democrats Need to Help Fix the Border Crisis or Get Out of Trump’s Way](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ffb6a9b3f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Even the most partisan Democrats are hard-pressed at this point to deny that the border crisis President Trump has long been warning about actually exists,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “Yet that hasn’t stopped them from reflexively denouncing pretty much any action he takes — without suggesting any solution or ideas of their own.”

🎬 **Scenes of a crisis** : [Smugglers push children through barbed wire barrier](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=18f4f9b8f2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Border Shock: 50% Surge in Gang Members, 650,000 Illegal Immigrants Will Be Freed into US in 2019](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b5d63e999&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“There has been a 50 percent jump in illegal immigrant gang members coming into the United States this year, according to the former Border Patrol chief” under President Obama, Paul Bedard reports. “What’s more, [Mark Morgan] warned in Senate testimony Thursday, loopholes in federal law will result in some 650,000 illegal immigrants — more than the population of Wyoming — being released into the United States.”
---
|
---
| [Jobless Claims Dropped to Lowest Level Since 1969 Last Week](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc7dc6ec80&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The number of Americans filing applications for new unemployment benefits fell last week to the lowest level in half a century,” Harriet Torry and Paul Kiernan report for _The Wall Street Journal_. “Thursday’s report suggests the labor market remains strong, leaving businesses reluctant to let workers go.”
---
|
---
| [NY Times, Washington Post are Still Disgracefully Enabling ‘Collusion Delusion’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa121ed7d0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Proving themselves happy to pander to folks who can’t let go of the Collusion Delusion, The New York Times and Washington Post are both suggesting that Attorney General William Barr spun special counsel Robert Mueller’s report to make President Trump look good. But neither account amounts to more than clickbait,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “It’s astounding that [the media is] trying to recover by digging the hole deeper.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Makes April First Step Act Month, Aiming to Boost Prisoner Rehabilitation Efforts](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df6bd16a6f&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump designated April as First Step Act Month, which includes cutting prison sentences for thousands of federal inmates, at a ceremony Monday,” Frank Miles reports. “We’re a nation that believes in redemption,” the President said. With the passage of the bipartisan criminal justice reform bill in December, President Trump “scored a win that eluded his predecessor, Barack Obama.”
---
|
---
| [Man Accused of Murdering New Jersey Nanny Was Twice-Deported Illegal Immigrant from Honduras](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=287606abb7&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“The man charged with murdering a female nanny who went missing while jogging in New Jersey last month was in the U.S. illegally and had twice been deported to Honduras, Immigration and Customs Enforcement confirmed to the _Washington Examiner_ Wednesday,” Anna Giaritelli reports. Jersey City, where the attack took place, designated itself as a sanctuary city in February 2017.
---
|
---
| [Editorial: Trump Tax Cuts are Not Taxing Situation for Most Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=88a5c6a28c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Florida Times-Union_
“Earlier this year the national media reported, almost with an implied glee, that taxpayers weren’t seeing the benefits they thought they would reap when President Donald Trump enacted the GOP-backed tax reform package in December 2017 . . . But as we see so often in Trump era, mining the truth requires digging a little deeper,” the _Florida Times-Union_ editorial board writes. “The congressional Joint Committee on Taxation last week estimated that 94% of workers will pay less in taxes this year.”

🎬**Watch:** [President Trump picks team to bring tax benefits to poor communities](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9c257fa895&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac451503a4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d3aba4676&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=20f0bfd274)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: UPDATE@protectvoting.org
subject: Do you think the electoral college is undemocratic?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- the Electoral College is undemocratic. Its existence allows just a handful of states to select our president. The Electoral College gave us George W. Bush. And Donald Trump. **So we 're TOTALLY PSYCHED that Elizabeth Warren isn't holding back:** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d1/925810618/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolishelectoralcollege?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2") [**Add your name if you agree that it is absolutely time to ABOLISH the undemocratic Electoral College:**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d0/925810618/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolishelectoralcollege?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree+that+it+is+ab&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2") | | | [Sign immediately ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d3/925810618/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolishelectoralcollege?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Sign+immediately+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2")
---
The Voter Protection Project is proud to announce we stand with Elizabeth Warren and support getting rid of the Electoral College.
Let's be clear: our president should be determined by a popular vote, so every vote from every state carries the same weight!
[**That 's why we are ready to work hard to support state-level initiatives in 2020 to eliminate the Electoral College and make Presidential elections fully democratic:**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d2/925810618/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolishelectoralcollege?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+are+ready+to+work+hard&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2")
| | [Abolish the Electoral College ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d5/925810618/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/abolishelectoralcollege?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Abolish+the+Electoral+College+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2")
---
Let's make our voices heard.
\-- Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d4/925810618/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d7/925810618/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d6/925810618/VEsO/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0791/72412298/44e23505/610089d9/925810618/VEsP/ "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190406_ElectoralCollege_U1_X2")

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Will you complete this short survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
A few weeks ago, my team and I asked you to fill out a brief survey -- we wanted to know more of what’s on your mind as we head further down the path in our campaign. According to the results, the number one issue on everyone’s mind is how we defeat Donald Trump and elect a Democrat as our next president. Other issues that rose to the top of the list included tackling climate change, fighting for civil rights, and delivering health care for everyone with Medicare for All. **We also asked you whether you support our campaign -- and here are some of the responses from undecided voters who shared their thoughts:**
* I am looking for “a future President who values children, education, gun control, justice reform, reducing the deficit, lowering the cost of health care and improving health benefits to name a few. Global warming is also a real concern as well.”

* “There are several great candidates, Senator Harris is among my favorites.”

**And some input from some of our supporters:**
* “She stands for the values and issues which are important to me, including making gun violence prevention a priority.”

* “After seeing Kamala in person at her kick-off rally in Oakland, I was totally impressed and inspired by her apparent honesty, intelligence and caring for everyday Americans and our country. I think she is a strong woman (tough in a good way). I will be proud to call her my President!!!!”

* “Time to take back our country and I know Kamala can get us on track.”

No matter where you stand on the issues of the day or our campaign, your feedback matters tremendously to me and my team. As we work to put together our campaign strategy for the coming months, I want to make sure your voice is heard. **[Can you complete our short April survey to share your input with me? Among other things, I want to hear what you think about the challenges we face, what’s driving your decision in this election, and what has you excited about 2020.**](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-petition-190402-april-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190406-full&source=ema190406-full&t=1&akid=4228%2E5755789%2EqmduJu) | | [ Take the survey ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-petition-190402-april-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190406-full&source=ema190406-full&t=2&akid=4228%2E5755789%2EqmduJu)
---
We are running a campaign we can all be proud of -- because it’s about people. Ours is truly a campaign of, by and for the people -- including you! I am grateful for your input and your support.
Sincerely,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list.
You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=4228%2E5755789%2EqmduJu), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4228%2E5755789%2EqmduJu)

name: Rep. Rashida Tlaib
subject: The Democratic establishment is closing ranks
body:
The DCCC is attempting to put their thumb on the scale of our democracy
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47cd/317910714/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
There's an important fight happening right now, and it's pitting progressives against the Democratic Party establishment.
The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) recently announced they would blacklist any campaign consultant who works with primary challengers to Democratic House incumbents.
**The DCCC is attempting to put their thumb on the scale of our democracy - intimidating progressive challengers in order to protect the party establishment.**
What if party leaders had done this in 2018? Then several important progressive allies such as Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ayanna Pressley might not be in Congress today.
**If we want a democracy that is truly reflective of our country's beautiful diversity, then we must push back against the DCCC's attacks on progressive insurgents.**
[**Join me in telling DCCC Chair Cheri Bustos to repeal this anti-democratic policy. Progressives in the House are speaking out for change, but it's most important that the DCCC hears from you!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47cc/317910714/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190406-rt-6m-ps")
Primaries are about bringing new ideas to our party, not making sure incumbents win re-election. And with new faces in Washington, we're advancing a progressive agenda that includes Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and a $15 minimum wage.
Our problems today are too urgent to go along with the status quo and hope to find a solution. That's why we need to end this new DCCC rule.
**[Join me. Add your name to our petition to tell the DCCC: Stop this anti-democratic policy that is alienating progressives and grassroots activists from the political process.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47cc/317910714/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190406-rt-6m-ps")**
**We need to bring people together and guarantee that our party represents the people, not the establishment status quo.**
Thank you in advance for signing the petition. If enough of us speak out together, change will come.
Always serving you,
Rep. Rashida Tlaib (MI-13)
**[SIGN THE PETITION»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47cc/317910714/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190406-rt-6m-ps")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47cf/317910714/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47ce/317910714/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47c9/317910714/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a55b/bed43eb/99feb564/75fb47c8/317910714/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
clean_body: The DCCC is attempting to put their thumb on the scale of our democracy "" Friends, There's an important fight happening right now, and it's pitting progressives against the Democratic Party establishment. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) recently announced they would blacklist any campaign consultant who works with primary challengers to Democratic House incumbents. The DCCC is attempting to put their thumb on the scale of our democracy - intimidating progressive challengers in order to protect the party establishment. What if party leaders had done this in 2018? Then several important progressive allies such as Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ayanna Pressley might not be in Congress today. If we want a democracy that is truly reflective of our country's beautiful diversity, then we must push back against the DCCC's attacks on progressive insurgents. "" Primaries are about bringing new ideas to our party, not making sure incumbents win re-election. And with new faces in Washington, we're advancing a progressive agenda that includes Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and a $15 minimum wage. Our problems today are too urgent to go along with the status quo and hope to find a solution. That's why we need to end this new DCCC rule. "" We need to bring people together and guarantee that our party represents the people, not the establishment status quo. Thank you in advance for signing the petition. If enough of us speak out together, change will come. Always serving you, Rep. Rashida Tlaib (MI-13) "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

name: Bob Menendez
subject: When disaster strikes, we don't leave our fellow Americans behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
Hello,

Hurricane Maria was the largest and most devastating storm to hit Puerto Rico in terms of cost and loss of life in over 118 years. The relief we send to Puerto Rico should mirror that.

But instead of putting his energy towards the recovery, President Donald Trump has not only neglected the 3.5 million Americans in Puerto Rico, he has also made blatantly false complaints about how much recovery money Puerto Rico received.

So, this isn't the first time Trump has misled the American people to avoid his responsibilities as president. But complaining that Puerto Rico is receiving 'too much hurricane relief funding' after over 3,000 citizens lost their lives in the storm is a new low.

In the Senate, I've been fighting for Puerto Rico's long-term recovery, because we cannot afford to turn our backs on our fellow citizens. And since New Jersey is home to the third-largest Puerto Rican population on the mainland, I know this cause is crucial to many people across our state, too.

**[Funding for the nutritional assistance program on the island ran out last month. To help provide relief to those working to rebuild their communities, donate what you can to the Hurricane Maria relief fund today.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c8a/74d715b9/19706f68/1f4bd4f3/3067585059/VEsH/ "https://hispanicfederation.org/unidos/")**

Trump falsely said Puerto Rico received $91 billion dollars for hurricane relief. But the actual financial relief received was only a fraction of that number. Not to mention Trump repeatedly said that our brothers and sisters in Puerto Rico are mishandling the money given to them.

That couldn't be further from the truth.

The truth of the matter is that families on the island are working to survive, rebuild their homes, and start a new life in the wake of an enormous tragedy that took thousands of lives. But despite being American citizens, Trump has ignored the majority Latino and Spanish-speaking island of Puerto Rico.

This is the time to act, not to point fingers and make accusations.

**[We aren't waiting for Trump to take humanitarian action -- and neither should you. Donate to the Hurricane Maria relief fund, today.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c8a/74d715b9/19706f68/1f4bd4f3/3067585059/VEsE/ "https://hispanicfederation.org/unidos/")**

Thank you,

Bob Menendez
| [DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c8a/74d715b9/19706f68/1f4bd4f3/3067585059/VEsF/ "https://hispanicfederation.org/unidos/")
---

PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
---

Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c8a/74d715b9/19706f68/1f4bd4f4/3067585059/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/update-your-email-address?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters. Menendez for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:hello@menendezfornj.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Menendez for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Menendez for Senate on [Facebook](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c8a/74d715b9/19706f68/1f4bd4f5/3067585059/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/MenendezForNJ/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c8a/74d715b9/19706f68/1f4bd4f6/3067585059/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c8a/74d715b9/19706f68/1f4bd4f7/3067585059/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Menendez for Senate emails.

name: Team Beto
subject: Volunteers for Beto in your community need you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Today, we’re asking you to do something important to help Beto
win. Our plan to elect Beto
as president depends on whether we can talk to millions of voters in
your community and across America before election time. That means we
have to start now.

Many people who support Beto are eager to get to work -- but they need
someone like you to help them.

This is the most critical thing you can do right now: Sign up to lead a
canvass in your community the weekend of April 13-14. Leading a canvass
is simple. You’ll meet other volunteers, give them the right tools and
training, and then you’ll all start knocking on doors and talking to
voters.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190406&t=1001&akid=26725%2E444211%2EnJJVth ]Can Beto count on you to lead a canvass in
your community? This
is your chance to help other volunteers for Beto in your community get to
work and make a big impact together.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190406&t=1002&akid=26725%2E444211%2EnJJVth ]Yes, I can lead a canvass »

Whether you’ve never knocked on doors for a campaign before or you’re a
canvassing pro, we’ll provide you with all of the support you need. We’ve
got a handy guide to help, and we’re scheduling webinar trainings now.

Knocking on doors and talking to voters might sound a little intimidating
at first, but it’s not hard. It’s fun, once you get into the swing of it!
We ask them who they’re planning to vote for. If they’re not sure, we’ll
ask what issues are most important to them and share why we personally
support Beto. The real key is listening more than talking.

This is proven to be the single most effective way to win votes. Boiled
down, it’s just about connecting -- face to face, neighbor to neighbor.
That’s what this campaign is all about.

It’s how we’re going to move this country away from fear and division --
and toward one where everyone can live in dignity. Where we achieve
universal, guaranteed, high-quality health care. Where we tackle mass
incarceration. Where we free our economy from dependence on fossil fuels.
Where teachers are paid a living wage. Where we lift up rural America. And
so much more.

It’s possible. But it’ll take a monumental effort -- all of us knocking on
doors, talking to our neighbors, winning votes. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-canvass-host/?source=ema20190406&t=1003&akid=26725%2E444211%2EnJJVth ]Now let’s start as
strong as we possibly can: Sign up to lead a canvass the weekend of April
13-14 here.

Onward!

Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190406footer&t=1004&refcode2=26725_444211_nJJVth&akid=26725%2E444211%2EnJJVth

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=26725%2E444211%2EnJJVth

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923
